source_note: NEGATİF TEST: ref1'in destek alıntısı kasıtlı olarak uydurulmuştur (abstract'ta yok).

entries.title: Psychological interventions to foster resilience in healthcare professionals.
entries.abstract: We included 44 RCTs. ... lower levels of stress or stress perception (SMD -0.61, 95% CI -1.07 to -0.15; 17 studies, 997 participants).

supports_claims.quote: the intervention completely eliminated all perceived stress in 100% of nurses
